steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for Eneva Dec 2024
from decimal import Decimal
# Inputs
assets = 52770780000.0
current_assets = 8518296000.0
cash = 3194255000.0
financial_investments = 672057000.0
receivables = 2330710000.0
inventories = 813508000.0
noncurrent_assets = 44252484000.0
imobilizado = 32032322000.0
intangivel = 8021184000.0
# liabilities
total_liabilities = 52770780000.0
current_liabilities = 5783912000.0
suppliers = 1660039000.0
current_loans = 1369143000.0
noncurrent_loans = 16017296000.0
noncurrent_liabilities = 26772101000.0
# equity
equity_consolidated = 20214767000.0
# parent equity (patrimonio liquido - saldos finais) using 5.07 Patrimonio Liquido - Saldos Finais
parent_equity = 18909488000.0
# income statement
revenue_12 = 11387505000.0
cogs_12 = -7434022000.0
gross_profit_12 = 3953483000.0
operating_expenses_12 = -1741574000.0
ebit_12 = 2211909000.0
financial_result_12 = -3561687000.0
profit_before_taxes_12 = -1349778000.0
income_tax_12 = 1899250000.0
net_income_12 = 549472000.0
attributed_to_controlling = 42013000.0
attributed_to_noncontrolling = 507459000.0
# Depreciation (retentions) as positive value
depr = 1689626000.0
# cash equivalents total (disponibilidades)
disponibilidades = cash + financial_investments
# shares
issued = 1932592000
treasury = 1202000
outstanding = issued - treasury
price = 12.47
# previous year/quarter (for 3-month calcs)
# previous annual (penultimo) revenue
revenue_prev_annual = 10090895000.0
# quarter report up to Sep30 values (YTD 9 months)
revenue_ytd_9m = 6528950000.0
ebit_ytd_9m = 2220602000.0
net_income_ytd_9m = 1499056000.0
# compute
market_cap = price * outstanding
d_burta = current_loans + noncurrent_loans
d_liquida = d_burta - disponibilidades
capital_giro = current_assets - current_liabilities
ativo_circ_liq = capital_giro  # assume
# per share metrics
revenue_per_share_12 = revenue_12 / outstanding
ebit_per_share_12 = ebit_12 / outstanding
assets_per_share = assets / outstanding
cap_giro_per_share = capital_giro / outstanding
ativo_circ_per_share = current_assets / outstanding
vpa = parent_equity / outstanding
lpa = attributed_to_controlling / outstanding
# multiples
p_l = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else None
p_vp = price / vpa
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share_12 if ebit_per_share_12!=0 else None
psr = price / revenue_per_share_12
p_ativos = price / assets_per_share
p_cap_giro = price / cap_giro_per_share if cap_giro_per_share!=0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / (ativo_circ_per_share) if ativo_circ_per_share!=0 else None
# EV calculations
ebitda = ebit_12 + depr
market_cap = round(market_cap,2)
EV = market_cap + d_liquida
ev_ebitda = EV / ebitda if ebitda!=0 else None
ev_ebit = EV / ebit_12 if ebit_12!=0 else None
# margins
marg_bruta = gross_profit_12 / revenue_12 * 100
marg_ebit = ebit_12 / revenue_12 * 100
marg_liq = net_income_12 / revenue_12 * 100
ebit_ativo = ebit_12 / assets * 100
# ROIC: EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic_denom = assets - suppliers - cash
roic = ebit_12 / roic_denom * 100
roe = net_income_12 / parent_equity * 100
liquidez_corr = current_assets / current_liabilities
div_br_patrim = d_burta / equity_consolidated * 100
giro_ativos = revenue_12 / assets
# 3-month (quarter) using difference between annual and YTD 9M
revenue_3m = revenue_12 - revenue_ytd_9m
ebit_3m = ebit_12 - ebit_ytd_9m
net_income_3m = net_income_12 - net_income_ytd_9m
# prepare results dictionary
results = {
    'Ativo': assets,
    'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': current_assets,
    'Dív. Bruta': d_burta,
    'Dív. Líquida': d_liquida,
    'Patrim. Lq': parent_equity,
    'Receita La (12m)': revenue_12,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_12,
    'Lucro Lo (12m)': net_income_12,
    'Receita La (3 meses)': revenue_3m,
    'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_3m,
    'Lucro Lo (3 meses)': net_income_3m,
    'P/L': p_l,
    'P/VP': p_vp,
    'P/EBIT': p_ebit,
    'PSR': psr,
    'P/Ativos': p_ativos,
    'P/Cap. Giro': p_cap_giro,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
    'EV / EBITDA': ev_ebitda,
    'EV / EBIT': ev_ebit,
    'LPA': lpa,
    'VPA': vpa,
    'Marg. Bruta': marg_bruta,
    'Marg. EBIT': marg_ebit,
    'Marg. La': marg_liq,
    'EBIT / Ativo': ebit_ativo,
    'ROIC': roic,
    'ROE': roe,
    'Liquidez Corr': liquidez_corr,
    'Div Br/ Patrim': div_br_patrim,
    'Giro Ativos': giro_ativos
}
# Print nicely
import json
print(json.dumps({k: (None if isinstance(v,float) and (v!=v) else v) for k,v in results.items()}, indent=2))
"} }
